stemHtml:
An aircraft will climb from an airport at an elevation of 3000 ft to a cruising altitude of 30 000 ft. Given the following information, which wind vector should be used to plan the climb?

The reported surface wind is 200º/22 kt. Both temperature and pressure are ISA.
The upper winds are:

FL050: 210º/25 kt
FL100: 230º/30 kt
FL180: 260º/50 kt
FL240: 290º/70 kt
FL300: 320º/80 kt
FL340: 350º/95 kt
